# Generated by exon. Do not edit manually.

cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 3.30)

set(CMAKE_CXX_STANDARD 23)
set(CMAKE_CXX_STANDARD_REQUIRED ON)
set(CMAKE_EXPERIMENTAL_CXX_IMPORT_STD "451f2fe2-a8a2-47c3-bc32-94786d8fc91b")
set(CMAKE_CXX_MODULE_STD ON)
project(seven_guis_cells LANGUAGES CXX)

if(MSVC)
    add_compile_options(/W4 /wd4996 /utf-8)
    add_compile_definitions(_CRT_SECURE_NO_WARNINGS)
endif()

if(NOT DEFINED EXON_ENABLE_TEST_TARGETS)
    set(EXON_ENABLE_TEST_TARGETS ON)
endif()

include(FetchContent)
if(NOT TARGET cppx)
    FetchContent_Declare(cppx
        GIT_REPOSITORY https://github.com/misut/cppx.git
        GIT_TAG v1.9.2
        GIT_SHALLOW ON
    )
    FetchContent_MakeAvailable(cppx)
endif()
if(NOT TARGET jsoncpp)
    FetchContent_Declare(jsoncpp
        GIT_REPOSITORY https://github.com/misut/jsoncpp.git
        GIT_TAG v0.1.4
        GIT_SHALLOW ON
    )
    FetchContent_MakeAvailable(jsoncpp)
endif()
if(NOT TARGET txn)
    FetchContent_Declare(txn
        GIT_REPOSITORY https://github.com/misut/txn.git
        GIT_TAG v0.7.0
        GIT_SHALLOW ON
    )
    FetchContent_MakeAvailable(txn)
endif()

if(NOT TARGET metal-cpp)
    add_subdirectory(${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/../../../libs/metal-cpp ${CMAKE_BINARY_DIR}/_deps/metal-cpp-build)
endif()
if(NOT TARGET phenotype)
    add_subdirectory(${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/../../.. ${CMAKE_BINARY_DIR}/_deps/phenotype-build)
endif()

add_executable(seven_guis_cells)
target_sources(seven_guis_cells PRIVATE
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/src/main.cpp
)
target_link_libraries(seven_guis_cells PRIVATE
    cppx
    jsoncpp
    txn
    metal-cpp
    phenotype
)

set_source_files_properties(
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/src/main.cpp
    PROPERTIES COMPILE_DEFINITIONS
    "EXON_PKG_NAME=\"seven_guis_cells\";EXON_PKG_VERSION=\"0.1.0\""
)
